title: After the Arima Kinen: God-Tier Freedom

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Grand Prix many aspire to compete in. Every
racer here today has fought to the finish with
their dreams and challenges in their heart.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That includes Mejiro Palmer and Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... I can't take it anymore! My legs, my heart... everything feels like it's going to burst!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(The Twinkle Series is tough, but it's pretty fire!
I'm still a ways off from really running freely,
though.)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry I kept you all waiting so long, everyone.
Did you see me run today?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm okay now. And from now on, I'll...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: You're...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I just wanna ask you something! You know how
you had all that pressure on you? Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you nervous or scared? You didn't really
look affected by everything that was going on
around you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Pressure? Well... I know the fans expect a lot from
me. But...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I don't really know much about being nervous or
scared... I don't have time for that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The only thing I gotta do is live up to people's
expectations. That's what I always want to do.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: They put their faith in me, and I run for them.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Faith and expectations, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(No kidding... So there's really someone who can
take pressure like that and turn it into power.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Oguri Cap... Is that it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Is that what it means to run freely?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone has learned something today. And still,
some challenges remain...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Dang, I still can't run as fast I want... I gotta figure
out how to unlock my body's full potential!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No one will tell tales of me if I continue to run like
this. I must train both my legs and my mind even
more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Huh, so we're all the same... Although, they
might be on a different level than I am...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Still, everyone's carrying something. And
everyone's grasping for what they want despite
that...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer.
choice_data_list: Great job out there. How was it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Just like I thought, I've still got a long ways to go.
I'm nowhere near strong enough yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I realized something. Everyone single person
in the Twinkle Series is carrying some kind of
burden.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm not the only one. So...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Next year, I'm gonna make sure I'm strong enough
not to let this pressure get the best of me! Just
like Oguri Cap!
